Ensure the use of safe and clean foods Rationale: /c170Safe and good-quality foods are essential for maintaining good health /c170Naturally-occurring toxins, environmental contaminants and adulterants in foods constitute a health hazard. /c170Consumption of unsafe foods can lead to food-borne diseases. Microbes (bacteria and moulds) and their products are responsible for food spoilage. Natural enzymes present in food also lead to its deterioration. Besides, insects, rodents, adulterants, natural toxins and various chemical residues beyond permissible levels, make the food unwholesome. In addition to moisture and environmental
